name: SquishFlatteningAlgorithm
summary: Represents the type of flattening to use

enum_values.name: Geometric
enum_values.summary: geometric flattening algorithm: (scale independent)the "spring" constant is proportional to 1/L^2 and the result is independent of scale.

enum_values.name: PhysicalStress
enum_values.summary: physical stress flattening algorithm: (scale dependent) the "spring" constant is proportional to 1/L.
